title: add character appearance editor — outfit slots, limb proportions, presets, WS sync
description:
## Summary
- Adds a floating in-canvas editor bubble (double-click or E key on a selected mannequin) for choosing outfit accessories (hat, hair, mask, body, shoes) and adjusting 6 limb proportion sliders
- WS `appearance` message relays outfit + proportions to all room peers in real-time; snapshot includes them so new joiners see the current look immediately  
- Global preset system: `GET/POST/DELETE /presets` REST endpoints backed by `brett/presets.json`; presets can be saved from the current figure and applied to any figure

## Test plan
- [x] task test:all (all offline tests pass)
- [x] node --check brett/server.js (no syntax errors)
- [x] Manual: double-click mannequin → bubble opens, outfit + proportions update in 3D
- [x] Manual: E key toggles bubble, Escape closes it with camera restore
- [x] Manual: save/load/delete presets via Presets panel

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
